passive.name: Granite Shield
passive.description: Malphite is shielded by a layer of rock which absorbs damage up to 10% of his maximum Health. If Malphite has not been hit for a few seconds, this effect recharges.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate:}} {{ci|Malphite}} {{tip|shields}} himself equal to a portion of {{as|his '''maximum''' health}}, which refreshes after a few seconds without taking damage.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate - Shard of the Monolith:}} '''Malphite''' gains increased percentage [[size]] equal to {{as|8% of his '''total''' armor}}, capped at 35% increased size at {{as|{{fd|{{#expr:35/0.08}}}} armor}}.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Innate:}} '''Malphite''' grants himself a {{tip|shield}} equal to {{as|10% of his '''maximum''' health}}. The shield lasts until it is broken, and refreshes after a few seconds of not taking damage.
wiki_detail.notes:
* '''Malphite's''' increased size is affected by his base armor and growth, but also reduced by {{ii|Black Cleaver}}. His increased size does not consider {{ais|Thunderclap|Malphite}} '''bonus''' armor.
** The bonus '''will''' become a size reduction if '''Malphite''' is dropped to ''negative'' armor values.
* ''Granite Shield'' does not refresh its cooldown from damage that is mitigated by {{tip|shield|shields}}.

Q.name: Seismic Shard
Q.description: Malphite sends a shard of the earth through the ground at his foe, dealing damage upon impact and stealing Move Speed for 3 seconds.
Q.tooltip: Malphite launches a shard of earth at an enemy, dealing {{ qdamagecalc }} magic damage and Slowing them by {{ e2 }}% for {{ slowduration }} seconds. Malphite also steals the amount Slowed, gaining it as Move Speed for {{ slowduration }} seconds.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Malphite}} sends a shard to the target enemy that deals {{as|magic damage}} and {{tip|slow|slows}} them for a few seconds.
wiki_detail.blurb2: He also gains {{sti|ms|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}} for the same duration.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Malphite''' sends a shard to the target enemy that deals {{as|magic damage}} and {{tip|slow|slows}} them for 3 seconds.
wiki_detail.description2: '''Malphite''' also gains {{sti|ms|{{as|'''bonus''' movement speed}}}} equal to the raw amount the target lost from the slow for the duration.
wiki_detail.notes:
* The rock spawns 100 units in front of '''Malphite'''.<!-- from his center or edge? -->
* '''Malphite''' will gain the bonus movement speed for the full duration as long as ''Seismic Shard'' impacts the target.
** Both a buff shown in the hotbar and duration bar above the ability icon will indicate the remaining duration.
* ''Seismic Shard's'' movement speed gain is entirely based off the target's current, and loss of, movement speed.
** Targets that are already {{tip|slow|slowed}} by another effect will grant '''Malphite''' diminished movement speed.
** {{tip|Slow resist|Slow-resistant}} and {{tip|slow-immune}} targets will reduce or nullify '''Malphite's''' gain.
{{Unit-targeted cancel conditions}}

W.name: Thunderclap
W.description: Malphite attacks with such force that it creates a sonic boom. For the next few seconds, his attacks create aftershocks in front of him.
W.tooltip:
Passive: Malphite gains {{ bonusarmorpassive*100 }}% Armor (%i:scaleArmor%{{ f1 }}). This effect is increased to {{ bonusarmorpassive*300 }}% (%i:scaleArmor%{{ f2 }}) while Granite Shield is active.

Active: Malphite's next Attack deals an additional {{ totalbonusdamage }} physical damage and creates an aftershock which deals {{ thunderclapsplash }} physical damage in their direction. His Attacks continue to create aftershocks for the next {{ thunderclapbuffduration }} seconds.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Passive:}} {{ci|Malphite}} gains {{sti|armor|{{as|'''bonus''' armor}}}}, tripled while {{ai|Granite Shield|Malphite}} is active.
wiki_detail.blurb2: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Malphite's''' next basic attack within a few seconds is empowered to gain {{sti|'''bonus''' range}} and deal {{as|'''bonus''' physical damage}}.
wiki_detail.blurb3: Additionally, '''Malphite's''' basic attacks for the next few seconds trigger a cone in the direction of the target that deals {{as|physical damage}} to enemies hit.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Passive:}} '''Malphite''' gains {{sti|armor|{{as|'''bonus''' armor}}}}, tripled while {{ai|Granite Shield|Malphite}} is active.
wiki_detail.leveling: {{st|Bonus Armor|{{as|{{ap|10 to 30}}% armor}}|Increased Bonus Armor|{{as|{{ap|10*3 to 30*3}}% armor}}}}
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Malphite''' empowers his next basic attack within 6 seconds to have an {{tip|uncancelable windup}}, gain {{sti|50 '''bonus''' range}}, and deal {{ccs|{{as|'''bonus''' physical damage}}|physical}} {{tip|on-hit}}.
wiki_detail.description3: Additionally, '''Malphite's''' basic attacks {{tip|on-hit}} for the next 5 seconds are empowered to trigger a cone in the direction of the target that deals {{as|physical damage}} to enemies hit.
wiki_detail.notes:
* The passive '''will''' amplify [[Armor_penetration#Reducing_armor|''negative'' armor]], too, if '''Malphite's''' armor is dropped that low.
* The empowered attack:
** Benefits from ''Thunderclap's'' cone effect.
** Prevents '''Malphite''' from casting {{ai|Seismic Shard|Malphite}} and {{ai|Ground Slam|Malphite}} during its windup.
** ''Cannot'' have its {{tip|attack windup|windup}} canceled by new movement or attack commands, or casting {{ai|Unstoppable Force|Malphite}}.
** ''Can'' have its windup canceled by casting {{ii|Hextech Rocketbelt}}.
* The cone starts from '''Malphite's''' location.
** Unlike similar spells, it does not deal its damage separately to the primary target of the attack(s); if the target is outside the [[area of effect]] when struck, it will not take the bonus damage.
* {{Pending for test}}: Interaction with parrying effects ({{tip|dodge}}, {{tip|block}}, {{tip|blind}}).
* Taking into account '''Malphite's''' {{as|'''base''' attack speed}} and attack speed growth, he'll be able to use up to 4-6 (levels 1-18) empowered attacks (including the initial one).
** With {{as|{{fd|2.5}} attack speed}}, he'll be able to use up to 12.

E.name: Ground Slam
E.description: Malphite slams the ground, sending out a shockwave that deals magic damage based on his Armor and reduces the Attack Speed of enemies for a short duration.
E.tooltip: Malphite slams the ground, dealing {{ edamagecalc }} magic damage and reducing Attack Speed by {{ asreduction }}% for {{ duration }} seconds.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Malphite}} slams the ground beneath him, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to nearby enemies and {{tip|cripple|crippling}} them for a short time.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Malphite''' slams the ground beneath him, dealing {{as|magic damage}} to nearby enemies and {{tip|cripple|crippling}} them for 3 seconds.
wiki_detail.notes:
* The {{tip|cripple}} [[Stacking#Stacks multiplicatively|stacks multiplicatively]] with other sources of [[Attack_speed#Decreasing_attack_speed|attack speed reductions]].
{{Effect at cast time end}}

R.name: Unstoppable Force
R.description: Malphite launches himself to a location at high speed, damaging enemies and knocking them into the air.
R.tooltip: Malphite charges with the force of a landslide, dashing Unstoppably. At the end of the dash, Malphite Knocks Up for {{ knockupduration }} seconds and deals {{ totaldamage }} magic damage.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Malphite}} {{tip|dashes}} with {{tip|displacement immunity}} to the target location. Upon arrival, he deals {{as|magic damage}} to nearby enemies and briefly {{tip|airborne|knocks them up}}.
wiki_detail.blurb4: {{sbc|{{tip|displacement immunity|nolink=true}}:}} The dash cannot be deterred by {{tip|crowd control}}.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Malphite''' {{tip|dashes}} with {{tip|displacement immunity}} to the target location. Upon arrival, he deals {{as|magic damage}} to nearby enemies and {{tip|airborne|knocks them up}} for {{fd|1.5}} seconds.
wiki_detail.description2: ''Unstoppable Force will cast at max range if cast beyond that.''
wiki_detail.notes:
* The dash speed can be up-to doubled if ''Unstoppable Force'' is targeted at the middle of a wall so that his destination ends up on the other side.
** It will be decreased if his destination ends up closer to him than his target location.
* If '''Malphite''' dies during his {{tip|dash}}, the ability cancels.
** If the dash is interrupted without '''Malphite''' dying, for instance when he enters {{tip|resurrection}} during ''Unstoppable Force'', he halts and the ability instead affects enemies at the stopped location.
